signals.headline: Solana** opened for European investors via Interactive Brokers/Zero Hash, but price held at ~$82 without breakout, faili
signals.raw: Solana** opened for European investors via Interactive Brokers/Zero Hash, but price held at ~$82 without breakout, failing to drive appreciation despite strong DeFi volume ($57B in March) and fundamentals like Firedancer upgrade.[5][3] This access expansion lacks immediate market-moving impact on predictions.[6]

signals.headline: Bitcoin Maintains $75,000 Level on April 16 Amid Institutional Demand and Regulatory Progress | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Maintains $75,000 Level on April 16 Amid Institutional Demand and Regulatory Progress | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No new confirmations, announcements, or resolutions today directly involving **April**, **Solana**, **Bitcoin**, or **Ethereum** that would shift prediction markets; recent surges (Bitcoin at $75K, Ethereum +8.6% to $2,377, Solana +6.3%) stem from earlier Iran-US peace signals a

signals.headline: Ethereum Outperforms on On-Chain Surge and Glamsterdam Upgrade Outlook | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw: Ethereum Outperforms on On-Chain Surge and Glamsterdam Upgrade Outlook | NO | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: Ethereum** rallied 8
signals.raw: Ethereum** rallied 8.6% to $2,377 with 41% on-chain activity jump, eyeing $2,600–$2,800 if above $2,300 holds, tied to ETF flows and 2026 Glamsterdam upgrade for speed/cost cuts; no fresh resolutions today.[2][6] Prediction markets show low short-term ATH odds (2% by June).[4]
